name: Ework Group AB (publ)
summary: Ework Group AB (publ) operates as a consultant supplier with focus on IT, telecom, technology, and business development in Sweden, Finland, Denmark, Poland and Norway. The company was formerly known as eWork Scandinavia AB (publ) and changed its name to Ework Group AB (publ) in May 2016. Ework Group AB (publ) was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Stockholm, Sweden.
